questions.assertion: The genetic material in eukaryotes is linear and double-stranded DNA.
questions.reason: The genetic material in eukaryotes is found in the nucleus, where it is organized in a linear and double-stranded structure.
opts: (A) Both A and R are true and R is the correct explanation of A
(B) Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
(C) A is true but R is false
(D) A is false but R is true
questions.explanation: The assertion is true because eukaryotic genetic material is indeed linear and double-stranded DNA. The reason is also true because it explains why this type of structure is found in the nucleus.

questions.assertion: DNA replication is a semi-conservative process.
questions.reason: During DNA replication, one strand of the original DNA molecule is conserved in the new DNA molecule, while the other strand is synthesized from the template.
opts: (A) Both A and R are true and R is the correct explanation of A
(B) Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
(C) A is true but R is false
(D) A is false but R is true
questions.explanation: The assertion is true because DNA replication is indeed a semi-conservative process. The reason is also true because it explains the mechanism of semi-conservative replication.

questions.assertion: DNA is a double-stranded molecule with complementary base pairing.
questions.reason: DNA is composed of two strands of nucleotides held together by hydrogen bonds between the bases, where adenine pairs with thymine and guanine pairs with cytosine.
opts: (A) Both A and R are true and R is the correct explanation of A
(B) Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
(C) A is true but R is false
(D) A is false but R is true
questions.explanation: The assertion is true because DNA is indeed a double-stranded molecule with complementary base pairing. The reason is also true because it explains the mechanism of base pairing in DNA.

questions.reason: DNA is composed of nucleotides held together by covalent bonds, where the sugar and phosphate molecules are linked together.

(C) A is true but R is false
(D) A is false but R is true

questions.reason: DNA is a highly stable molecule due to the covalent bonds between the sugar and phosphate molecules, as well as the hydrogen bonds between the bases.
